approved_command_preview: Run approved repo script chatgpt_staging/exec_scripts/exec-20260519-wbs04-post-first-four-export-002.ps1. The script performs a read-only Airtable full-record export for DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger, Queue Control, Governance Control Plane, Operator Preferences, Repo Surface Registry, Local Configuration Registry, and Operator Tools Registry. Delete Queue is intentionally excluded because approved queue rows auto-delete after processing.
